# Hasibur Rahman

> Digital marketing specialist and video editor based in Dhaka, Bangladesh, working with clients globally on paid advertising, short-form video content, and web development.

Hasibur Rahman helps brands grow through Meta and Google ad campaigns, high-retention reels and short-form video editing, and conversion-focused landing pages.

## Services
- Paid advertising (Meta Ads, Google Ads)
- Short-form video / reels editing
- Landing page and website development
- Marketing strategy consultation
